ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location where the data was recorded */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the data entry */,
  "tempmax" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded for the day */,
  "tempmin" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded for the day */,
  "temp" REAL /* Average temperature for the day */,
  "feelslikemax" REAL /* Maximum perceived temperature */,
  "feelslikemin" REAL /* Minimum perceived temperature */,
  "feelslike" REAL /* Average feels-like temperature */,
  "dew" REAL /* Dew point temperature */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "precip" REAL /* Total precipitation for the day */,
  "precipprob" REAL /* Probability of precipitation */,
  "precipcover" REAL /* Percentage of area covered by precipitation */,
  "preciptype" INTEGER /* Type of precipitation (e.g., rain, snow) */,
  "snow" REAL /* Total snowfall for the day */,
  "snowdepth" REAL /* Snow depth on the ground */,
  "windgust" REAL /* Maximum wind gust speed */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Average wind speed */,
  "winddir" REAL /* Wind direction */,
  "sealevelpressure" REAL /* Sea level pressure */,
  "cloudcover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility distance */,
  "solarradiation" REAL /* Solar radiation received */,
  "solarenergy" REAL /* Solar energy produced */,
  "uvindex" REAL /* Ultraviolet index */,
  "severerisk" TEXT /* Severity risk level for the day */,
  "sunrise" TEXT /* Time of sunrise */,
  "sunset" TEXT /* Time of sunset */,
  "moonphase" REAL /* Phase of the moon */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* General weather conditions (e.g., clear, cloudy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the weather conditions */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon representing the current weather conditions */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data quality entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the associated severe weather alert */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast compared to actual data */,
  "data_source_reliability" REAL /* Reliability of the data source */,
  "data_source_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected from the source */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_name FOREIGN KEY ("location_name") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_id") REFERENCES data_quality ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES severe_weather_alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_conditions FOREIGN KEY ("conditions") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_preciptype FOREIGN KEY ("preciptype") REFERENCES precipitation_types ("precip_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country in which the location is situated */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the location data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_types" (
  "precip_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation type */,
  "precip_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the precipitation type (e.g., rain, snow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the precipitation type */,
  "is_snow" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the precipitation type is snow */,
  "is_rain" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the precipitation type is rain */,
  "is_hail" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the precipitation type is hail */,
  "is_fog" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the precipitation type is fog */,
  "is_drizzle" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the precipitation type is drizzle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precip_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition (e.g., sunny, cloudy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition */,
  "is_clear" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the condition is clear */,
  "is_cloudy" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the condition is cloudy */,
  "is_foggy" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the condition is foggy */,
  "is_stormy" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the condition is stormy */,
  "is_snowy" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the condition is snowy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "severe_weather_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., storm warning, flood alert) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message about the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was issued */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the alert */,
  "alert_expiry" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert expires */,
  "alert_severity_score" REAL /* Numeric score representing the severity of the alert */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* Source of the alert (e.g., weather station, satellite) */,
  "alert_affected_areas" TEXT /* Areas affected by the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_severe_weather_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the role has administrative privileges */,
  "default_dashboard" TEXT /* Default dashboard for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., weather station, satellite) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_source_location" TEXT /* Location of the data source */,
  "data_source_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data source */,
  "data_source_status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "data_source_maintenance" TEXT /* Last maintenance date of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated weather data entry */,
  "quality_rating" INTEGER /* Quality rating (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "quality_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the quality of the data */,
  "data_quality_assessor" TEXT /* Name of the person who assessed the data quality */,
  "data_quality_date" TEXT /* Date when the data quality was assessed */,
  "data_quality_method" TEXT /* Method used to assess the data quality */,
  "data_quality_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the data quality assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
